description.en: The successor to IPv4 with 128-bit addresses, simplified header, and built-in support for extension headers. Designed to address IPv4 address exhaustion.
description.zh: IPv4的继任者，采用128位地址、简化头部，内置扩展头支持。旨在解决IPv4地址耗尽问题。

flowLabel.en: Flow label for identifying packet flows
flowLabel.zh: 流标签，用于标识数据包流

payloadLength.en: Length of payload in bytes (excluding header)
payloadLength.zh: 载荷长度（字节），不含头部

hopLimit.en: Hop limit, decremented by each router
hopLimit.zh: 跳数限制，每经过一个路由器减1

payload.en: Upper layer protocol data or extension headers
payload.zh: 上层协议数据或扩展头
